summary: M436 — Removed 'New Combat UI (Beta)' settings toggle (no alternate render path remains after M434/M435). isUiOverhaulEnabled() now returns true unconditionally. Removed vibej.am 2026 jam widget from index.html, play.html, contact.html, and the RSG Demos generate_pages_index.js. Restored the title-screen login UI (LOGIN_UI_DISABLED=false). iPhone 14 Pro front page: hero-stats grid forced to 3 columns (was 2 + orphan), top spacing above the '6 ACTS · 30 CLASSES · 35 COMPANIONS' tag tightened (24px top padding, 18px headline gap).
